name: Martin County Cooperative
description_short: Mercer County Community Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution offering savings accounts, loans, and online banking services to eligible members in Pennsylvania and surrounding areas.
description_long:
Mercer County Community Federal Credit Union (MCCFCU) is a federal credit union based in Hermitage, Pennsylvania, serving the Mercer County area and surrounding communities. The institution operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit organization regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), distinguishing it from traditional for-profit banks. The credit union has maintained operations serving its membership with a focus on community financial services and member benefits. Their physical presence includes multiple branch locations, with offices accessible via phone at 724-981-9410 and 724-342-2246, and they maintain a routing number (243384965) for electronic transactions.

MCCFCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including share savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), student checking accounts designed for teens ages 15-17, auto loans, mortgages, and various other loan products. Their auto lending program is particularly developed, featuring a partnership with AutoSmart to provide online car-buying tools and pre-approval services. The credit union advertises competitive rates, with featured auto loan rates as low as 4.99% APR for both new and used vehicles (2024-2026 model years) and mortgage rates starting at 5.99% APR. They provide modern digital banking through It'sMe247 Online Banking platform, enabling account history review, transfers, bill pay, and e-statement access, plus a mobile banking app.

What distinguishes MCCFCU from larger financial institutions is their focus on personalized member service and community engagement. They offer educational resources through a partnership with GreenPath Financial Wellness, providing free webinars on financial health topics including emotionally healthy spending, identity theft prevention, and financial wellness check-ups. Teen student accounts are specifically designed to help young members build banking habits early, with no minimum balance requirements or monthly fees. Their loan experts are positioned to provide consultative support in matching members with appropriate products and terms. The institution demonstrates commitment to accessibility through multiple communication channels and a user-friendly online platform.

For consumers seeking membership, eligibility requirements apply—the website directs prospects to inquire about membership qualification. While MCCFCU offers competitive rates and solid product offerings typical of mid-sized credit unions, members should note that as a regional institution serving primarily the Mercer County area, physical branch access may be limited compared to national banks. The credit union's online-first approach and partnership with AutoSmart modernize their service delivery, though questions about additional fees (beyond advertised zero fees for student accounts) and specific eligibility criteria would require direct contact. Overall, MCCFCU appears well-suited for individuals seeking personalized credit union membership with competitive lending rates and community-focused financial services.
services: Share savings accounts with competitive interest rates
Teen student checking accounts (ages 15-17) with debit cards
New vehicle auto loans (4.99% APR advertised)
Used vehicle auto loans for 2024-2026 models (4.99% APR advertised)
Mortgage loans with rates from 5.99% APR
AutoSmart online car buying and pre-approval tools
It'sMe247 online banking platform with bill pay, transfers, and account history
Mobile banking app with ATM and debit card access
E-statements and digital tax documents (1099-INT forms)
IRA accounts with standard IRS reporting
Free financial wellness webinars and educational resources
Personalized loan consultation and product matching
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 4.99% APR for both new and used vehicles (2024-2026 models)
Mortgage rates as low as 5.99% APR with flexible terms
Teen student checking accounts with zero minimum balance and no monthly fees
AutoSmart partnership provides online car buying tools and pre-approval functionality
Free financial wellness webinars through GreenPath partnership covering identity theft, spending, and financial planning
Modern It'sMe247 online banking platform with bill pay, transfers, and e-statements
Mobile banking app available for account management and debit card use
Personalized loan consultation services to match members with appropriate products
cons: Membership eligibility is restricted and requires inquiry—not open to all consumers
Regional footprint limited primarily to Mercer County, Pennsylvania area with limited branch locations
Website does not clearly disclose fee structures beyond student account (zero fee) promotion
Limited information about specific CD rates, savings account features, or deposit insurance limits on website
AutoSmart tool requires navigation through third-party system, not fully integrated into primary platform
best_for: Mercer County, Pennsylvania residents and employees seeking personalized credit union membership
Auto buyers looking for competitive rates combined with online pre-approval tools
Parents wanting to establish no-fee checking accounts for teenagers ages 15-17
Homebuyers in the region seeking mortgage products below 6% APR
diagnosis: Mercer County Community Federal Credit Union is best for Mercer County residents and regional employees seeking competitive auto loans, mortgages, and basic deposit products with personalized service from a member-owned institution. The primary caveat is that membership is restricted by eligibility requirements (requiring inquiry), the institution serves primarily a regional footprint, and consumers should directly contact the credit union to clarify specific fees, eligibility criteria, and current rates beyond those featured on the website.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Martin County Cooperative — NCUA-insured credit union in loogootee, IN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
